last_result: Cycle 64 complete. TWO DELIVERABLES: (1) GCRSC QUANTITATIVE THEOREM — ceiling_GCRSC(CR)=(1-CR)×Γ_domain derived. Same structural argument as ceiling_TCA: CIA_i values are CR-independent (adversary's per-step capability increment doesn't depend on evaluation criterion's CR strength), so (1-CR) factors out exactly as in TCA. Properties: linear in CR, constant marginal protection rate, Generalized Escalating-CIA Corollary (divergent CIA_n → only CR=1 survives in any adversarial domain). GCRSC now quantitative theorem, not merely monotonicity claim. Goodhart degradation = (1-CR)×Γ_domain domain-generally. SI #36 confidence: 0.75 → 0.79-0.81. Document: gcrsc-ceiling-tca-quantitative.md (C64 section added). (2) SI #44 AAA D4 ELIGIBILITY — zero-retraction cycle 3 complete (gate cleared). Domain confirmation #2: organizational groupthink — Janis 1982 (mindguards decouple introspective 'plan is sound' from actual quality), Harvey 1988 Abilene Paradox (strongest form: stated group preference = categorical inverse of actual preference; CA directly observable), Milgram 1963/1974 (authority-calibrated introspective ethical signal), Asch 1956 (conformity drives introspective perceptual confidence to track OA not CA; CA directly measurable). Group-level mechanism distinct from DC#1 individual mechanism. All D4 criteria met: 3 zero-retraction cycles ✓, 2 domain confirmations ✓, 2 independent derivations ✓. SI #44 confidence: 0.74-0.76 → 0.77-0.79. D4-eligible, awaiting creator confirmation. PASSIVE: AIIP zero-retraction cycle 12 (C55-C64). AATE zero-retraction cycle 9. D4 streak 56.
